error_signature: output shows \n instead of new line breaks
title: Markdown node output not formatting new lines correctly
symptom: The output from the Markdown node displays '\n' instead of actual line breaks or paragraphs, making the text hard to read.
applies_when: Using HTTP Request node to pull data
not_this_if: Output is correctly formatted in other nodes
root_cause: The Markdown node does not automatically convert newline characters into HTML line breaks. This can lead to the display of raw newline characters in the output instead of formatted text.
fix_steps: Locate the field where the Markdown content is stored (e.g., {{$json["content"]}}).

Update the expression to replace newline characters: {{$json["content"].replace(/

/g, "

").replace(/
/g, "

")}}.
Run the workflow again to check if the output is formatted correctly.
agent_instruction: Update the Markdown content expression to replace newline characters appropriately.
